knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: What is a Fraction?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: भिन्न क्या है?

prompt.english: In the fraction 3/8, how many equal parts are taken?
prompt.hindi: भिन्न 3/8 में कितने बराबर भाग लिए गए हैं?

knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Types of Fractions?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: भिन्नों के प्रकार?

prompt.english: Which of the following is an improper fraction?
prompt.hindi: निम्न में से कौन-सा अपूर्ण भिन्न है?

knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Fractions in Lowest Terms?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: सरलतम रूप में भिन्न?

prompt.english: Write 12/18 in lowest terms.
prompt.hindi: 12/18 को सरलतम रूप में लिखिए।

knowPrompt.english: Do you know this topic: Comparison of Fractions?
knowPrompt.hindi: क्या आप यह विषय जानते हैं: भिन्नों की तुलना?

prompt.english: Which fraction is greater?
prompt.hindi: कौन-सा भिन्न बड़ा है?

prompt.english: Write the fractions for the shaded parts and the unshaded parts. (a) (b) (c) Shaded =................ Shaded =................ Shaded =................ Unshaded =................ Unshaded =................ Unshaded =
prompt.hindi: Write the fractions for the shaded parts and the unshaded parts. (a) (b) (c) Shaded =................ Shaded =................ Shaded =................ Unshaded =................ Unshaded =................ Unshaded =

acceptedAnswers: (a) Shaded = 2/3, Unshaded = 1/3 (b) Shaded = 1/6, Unshaded = 5/6 (c) Shaded = 4/9, Unshaded = 5/9
(a) Shaded = 2 3, Unshaded = 1 3 (b) Shaded = 1 6, Unshaded = 5 6 (c) Shaded = 4 9, Unshaded = 5 9
